title: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu - Chapter 5 - Communicating (live, unedited)
summary: CS50's Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu is an educational series covering AI topics. Chapter 5 focuses on Communicating, delivered as a live, unedited lecture. The course is available through multiple platforms including edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare.
writeup: This is Chapter 5 of CS50's Introduction to Artificial Intelligence, presented by Brian Yu as a live, unedited lecture covering communicating in the context of artificial intelligence. The video is part of Harvard University's introductory computer science curriculum associated with David J. Malan, distributed through edX, Harvard Extension School, and other platforms under a Creative Commons license. The summary does not specify which communication methods or models the chapter addresses.
